articles.title: Calabria awaits De Vrij at Panathinaikos: "It's better to have him in the team than as an opponent. He's an excellent player"
articles.summary: Stefan de Vrij is preparing to become a new Panathinaikos player. Davide Calabria, former Milan captain and opponent in many Milan derbies played against him, will welcome him in Athens.

articles.title: Do you remember Veliz? The young striker who preferred Tottenham to Milan will leave Brazil again
articles.summary: The young 22-year-old Argentinian Alejo Véliz leaves Tottenham permanently and moves to Bahia, a club in the Brazilian top flight, for a fee close to 9 million euros.

articles.title: The transfer market opens in two days: negotiations officially start on Monday
articles.summary: There are two days left until the official start of the summer transfer market session, even less. This year, unlike the usual date of July 1st, official negotiations will open on Monday June 29th.
